# Map

**Path:** `map`

Methods that explicitly match a query scan or submap against a persistent map representation and produce place or global-localization hypotheses.

## Scope

**Include:** scan-to-map retrieval; map node recognition; global relocalization

**Exclude:** map used only as storage for single-scan descriptors

## Papers (8)

### 2024

- **[SGLC: Semantic Graph-Guided Coarse-Fine-Refine Full Loop Closing for LiDAR SLAM](../papers/sglc-semantic-graph-guided-coarse-fine-refine-full-loop-closing-for-lidar-slam.md)** ﾂｷ arXiv ﾂｷ `arxiv_preprint` ﾂｷ `Semantic graphs` ﾂｷ `Learning` ﾂｷ [Paper](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.08106) ﾂｷ [Code](https://github.com/nubot-nudt/SGLC)
